data.name: mistral_7B
data.description: Mistral 7B is a 7 billion parameter language model with a 8K token context length outperforming Llama2 13B on many tests.

data.name: llama3_8B
data.description: Llama3 8B is a 8 billion parameter language model with a 8K token context length trained on 15T tokens. There are specific use restrictions associated with this model.

data.name: llama3.1_8B_instruct
data.description: Llama3.1 8B Instruct is a 8 billion parameter chat model. The context length is currently limited to 8K tokens. There are specific use restrictions associated with this model.

data.name: gemma3_27B_it
data.description: Gemma 3 27B instruct is a 27 billion parameter language model with a 128K token context length. There are specific use restrictions associated with this model.

data.name: llama3.3_70B_instruct
data.description: Llama3.3 70B instruct is a 70 billion parameter chat model. The context length is currently limited to 8K tokens. There are specific use restrictions associated with this model.

data.name: gptj_6B
data.description: GPT-J is a 6 billion parameter language model with a 2K token context length trained on the Pile (825 GB of text data) published by EleutherAI.

data.name: madlad400_7B
data.description: MADLAD400 7B is a 7 billion parameter language model specialized for translation. It supports multilingual translation between about 400 languages. See the translate endpoint.

data.name: stable_diffusion
data.description: Stable Diffusion is a 1 billion parameter text to image model trained to generate 512x512 pixel images from English text (sd-v1-4.ckpt checkpoint). See the text_to_image endpoint. There are specific use restrictions associated with this model.

data.name: whisper_large_v3
data.description: Whisper Large v3 is a 1.5 billion parameter model for speech to text transcription in 100 languages. See the transcript endpoint.

data.name: parler_tts_large
data.description: Parler-TTS v1 is a 2.2 billion parameter model for Text to Speech in English. See the speech endpoint.

data.name: bge_large_en_v1.5
data.description: BGE-Large-EN-v1.5 is an embedding model suitable for RAG. See the embeddings endpoint.
